news.headline: PXG introduces PXG Black Ops Ultra Lite Driver, enhancing golfers speed & forgiveness; new addition to award-winning lineup.
news.summary: PXG, a renowned golf equipment and apparel company based in Scottsdale, Arizona, announced on February 13, 2025, the expansion of its PXG Black Ops Collection. The latest addition to the lineup is the PXG Black Ops Ultra Lite Driver. This launch adds to PXG's award-winning range of products, aimed at enhancing the gaming experience for golf enthusiasts.

news.headline: ClinicMind appoints Dr. Igor Sobol, MD, PhD, to Advisory Board, bringing 45 years of experience to enhance healthcare tech solutions.
news.summary: Dr. Igor Sobol, MD, PhD, has joined ClinicMind as an Advisory Board Member, boasting an impressive 45 years of expertise in medical practice, research, and healthcare technology. Dr. Sobol's extensive experience will be invaluable in advancing ClinicMind's goal of improving clinical workflows and elevating patient care standards.

news.headline: QueBIT partners with Board for planning, decision-making. Enables better decisions, sustainable growth for businesses.
news.summary: QueBIT recently announced a strategic partnership with Board, a prominent Enterprise Planning and Decision-Making Platform. This collaboration aims to assist businesses in enhancing their financial, operational, and strategic planning processes. By leveraging Board's expertise, QueBIT plans to empower organizations to make informed decisions based on data, leading to sustainable growth.

news.headline: Bob Evans Farmhouse Kitchen's "Egg Crack, Give Back" fundraiser for agricultural education returns for the fifth year.
news.summary: During the week of February 15, in New Albany, Ohio, Bob Evans Farmhouse Kitchen™ will be hosting their annual "Egg Crack, Give Back" fundraiser for the fifth year. This event allows guests to contribute to agricultural education in two ways. This initiative aims to raise awareness and funds for the cause.

news.headline: Avid CRM integrates with Microsoft Outlook for a comprehensive tool combining communication, organization, and relationship management.
news.summary: Avid CRM has integrated CRM features into the latest version of Microsoft Outlook, enabling businesses to utilize a comprehensive tool that merges communication, organization, and relationship management within one interface. This development was announced in Bellevue, Washington on February 13, 2025.

news.headline: ABCorp adds PA12 White to material library for 3D printing, offering strength, flexibility, reusability, and color customization.
news.summary: A cutting-edge material offering strength, flexibility, reusability, and precise color customization for 3D printed components has been introduced in Boston on Feb. 13, 2025. This innovation comes from American Banknote Corporation (ABCorp®), a leading manufacturing service provider in the United States. The new material promises enhanced properties for 3D printed parts, ensuring durability and adaptability without compromising on color options. This development marks an advancement in the additive manufacturing sector, benefiting industries and consumers alike.

news.headline: Consumers are critical of identity-based ad-targeting as half find it perpetuates offensive stereotypes. GumGum's survey investigates consumer sentiment.
news.summary: GumGum has unveiled the "Digital Advertising Pulse Check" initiative in Santa Monica, California. This program aims to analyze consumer perceptions regarding data-heavy identity ad-targeting strategies. The company, known for its contextual-first approach in digital advertising, introduced the project on February 13, 2025.

news.headline: Greenberg Traurig expands with addition of Sarah Runnells Martin in Delaware office on Feb 13, 2025.
news.summary: Greenberg Traurig, LLP, a leading global law firm, has bolstered its Litigation Practice by bringing in Sarah Runnells Martin as a new shareholder at its Delaware office. The addition of Martin on Feb. 13, 2025, highlights the firm's commitment to growth and expertise in the legal sector. This move further strengthens Greenberg Traurig's presence in the industry, signaling its dedication to providing top-quality legal services to clients.

news.headline: Setuply introduces Invoicing for business clients to close revenue gap and enhance CMX experience.
news.summary: Today, Setuply, Inc. revealed the introduction of Setuply Invoicing, a new solution specifically designed for technology and service-oriented companies. This innovation aims to combat issues such as lost revenue and profit leakage resulting from disjointed sales data. Setuply is a prominent company known for its AI-powered client onboarding and Client Management Experience (CMX) services. The new Invoicing platform is expected to enhance efficiency for businesses in this sector by addressing these challenges.

news.headline: Waste industry adopting AI rapidly, surprising many. Organizations researching and implementing advanced AI techniques.
news.summary: Companies specializing in waste management and removal are increasingly embracing cutting-edge artificial intelligence (AI) technologies, as evidenced by our data. The research and implementation of advanced AI techniques in this sector are growing rapidly. This trend is highlighted by the adoption of AI Navigation systems and other innovative solutions. The industry is witnessing a significant shift towards utilizing AI, showcasing a notable increase in the integration of AI technologies for improved efficiency and productivity.

news.headline: National Ability Center and Toyota partner to increase accessibility in adaptive skiing and snowboarding in Park City, Utah.
news.summary: In an effort to provide an inclusive and empowering mountain experience for all skiers and riders, a multi-year partnership has been established in Park City, Utah. The National Ability Center (NAC), recognized for its leadership in adaptive recreation and outdoor adventures, has proudly initiated a collaboration with Toyota. This initiative, set to commence on Feb. 13, 2025, aims to enhance the skiing and riding experience for individuals of all abilities. Through this partnership, NAC and Toyota are dedicated to creating an environment that promotes accessibility and empowerment in outdoor activities.

news.headline: Butler Community College partners with Voyatek to combat rising application fraud; implements Admissions Fraud Firewall.
news.summary: Butler Community College is proactively addressing the rising issue of application fraud on a national scale by adopting Voyatek's Admissions Fraud Firewall. This initiative is a crucial step in safeguarding both students and resources. The decision was made in light of the surge in fraudulent activities across the country. The implementation of Voyatek's solution marks a significant move towards ensuring the integrity of the admissions process. The college aims to mitigate risks associated with fraudulent applications by leveraging this cutting-edge technology. The decision was announced in Columbia, Md., on Feb. 13, 2025, as part of the college's commitment to combating fraud effectively.

news.headline: CommonWealth Purchasing Group adds Omnicell to vendor portfolio for medication adherence solutions.
news.summary: A prominent group purchasing organization, CommonWealth Purchasing Group (CPG), specializing in serving community health centers and non-profit entities, has revealed its latest development: the inclusion of Omnicell's medication adherence solutions in its list of vendors. This expansion comes as CPG continues to enhance its offerings. The announcement was made in Boston on February 13, 2025.

news.headline: 1 in 4 workers facing relocation due to Return-to-Office policies. Many need to move or change jobs.
news.summary: Employees are being urged to go back to a workplace in Bellevue, Washington, despite no longer residing nearby. This move has led to numerous individuals either having to move or look for alternative jobs. The situation underscores the challenges faced by workers in adapting to changing workplace dynamics.

news.headline: 40% of workers found love after returning to the office as remote workers struggle with dating. - ResumeTemplates.com Survey via PRWeb.
news.summary: A recent study from ResumeTemplates.com revealed a trend in office romances among remote workers who are facing challenges in their dating lives. The findings indicate that a significant number of individuals are considering transitioning to in-person jobs to increase their romantic opportunities. This shift is particularly notable in cities like Seattle, where a surge in office romances has been observed. The study, conducted in February 2025, sheds light on the impact of remote work on relationships and the potential benefits of in-person work arrangements for improving one's dating prospects.

news.headline: Rentacomputer.com offers copier rentals for businesses with document management needs; has 35 years experience in tech rentals.
news.summary: Rentacomputer.com, a tech rental company with more than 35 years of industry experience, provides businesses throughout the United States with adaptable and economical copier rental options. These rentals address diverse document management requirements, including events, temporary spikes in workload, and daily operations.

news.headline: Frank Yin joins Washington Research Foundation as investment associate, evaluating startup opportunities for Washington state innovations.
news.summary: Frank Yin, Ph.D., has recently started working with Washington Research Foundation (WRF) in Seattle on Feb. 13, 2025. In his new role, Yin will primarily be responsible for identifying and assessing startup investment opportunities aimed at promoting Washington state innovations for public benefit. This move is significant as it signifies WRF's dedication towards fostering innovation and supporting the local startup ecosystem.

news.headline: Dental implant expert Dr. Irfan Atcha featured on WGN-9 as medical contributor on same day dental implants.
news.summary: In Chicago, Illinois, on February 10, 2025, Dr. Irfan Atcha, a leading expert in dental implants, made an appearance on the WGN-9 Daytime show which was broadcast on January 29, 2025. During the show, Dr. Atcha discussed same-day dental implants known for their long-term success cases. He shared expert medical insights on this procedure, offering viewers valuable and scientifically supported information on oral health.

news.headline: Ordoro and Farm2Me partner to help food businesses streamline operations. Empowering farmers and artisans with eCommerce tools for easier sales and shipping.
news.summary: Ordoro and Farm2Me have collaborated to support small food businesses in enhancing their operations. This partnership aims to assist local farmers and artisans in utilizing powerful eCommerce tools to simplify the sales and shipping process for fresh, locally sourced products. The alliance allows for streamlined fulfillment, efficient inventory management, and improved scalability for these businesses. The initiative is centered in Austin and involves a significant number of small food businesses benefiting from these tools and services.

news.headline: IAS introduces new features for meta optimization solution, reducing ad spend waste by 71% on FB and IG.
news.summary: Businesses around the world are experiencing a significant decrease in wasted advertising expenses by up to 71% thanks to the implementation of AI-powered content block lists on popular social media platforms such as Facebook, Instagram Feed, and Reels. This breakthrough was highlighted by Integral Ad Science (Nasdaq: IAS), a prominent player in global media measurement. The development, confirmed on February 13, 2025, underscores the growing reliance on advanced technology to enhance targeted advertising strategies and boost efficiency.

news.headline: New healthcare agency FLEX MARKETING launches in San Francisco on Feb. 13, 2025, to modernize healthcare marketing.
news.summary: Today, in San Francisco, a cutting-edge independent agency called FLEX MARKETING is making headlines. This agency is revolutionizing healthcare marketing by implementing a dynamic and innovative approach. Specializing in pharmaceuticals, biotech, and medical industries, FLEX MARKETING is set to address the industry's challenges head-on. The launch date, February 13, 2025, marks the beginning of a new era in healthcare marketing strategy.

news.headline: $3 ADA price forecasted for 2025 based on Cardano chart fractal from 2020.
news.summary: In a recent report, it was stated that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to 4.2%. This marks a decrease of 0.5% compared to the previous quarter. The total number of employed individuals has also seen a notable increase, reaching 62.3 million. Additionally, the report highlighted a slight growth in average hourly wages, rising by 2.3% in the same period. This data indicates a positive trend in the labor market, with more people finding employment opportunities and experiencing wage growth.

news.headline: Fast food market expected to grow by $119.6 billion (2025-2029) driven by vendors' online presence and AI impact - Technavio.
news.summary: A recent report highlights the impact of AI on market evolution, focusing on the fast food industry which is projected to increase by USD 119.6 billion between 2025 and 2029. Despite this substantial growth, the advancement is expected to maintain a steady pace with a 3% CAGR throughout the forecasted period. This data comes from Technavio's analysis.

news.headline: Germany’s Chancellor Scholz: Germany must spend considerably more on defense.
PGT Custom Windows and Doors wins 2 awards in DWM Readers’ Choice Awards: WinGuard Vinyl Preferred line and Preferred View Sliding Glass Door.
news.summary: In North Venice, Florida, PGT Custom Windows and Doors, a leading provider of high-performance windows and doors in the US, recently received two prestigious awards from Door and Window Market Magazine. The company's WinGuard Vinyl Preferred line and the WinGuard Preferred View Sliding Glass Door were both recognized in the annual Readers’ Choice Awards. The magazine's staff annually compiles data on top industry products for its readers. In December, the publication seeks feedback from its audience to determine the winners. This recognition highlights PGT's commitment to quality and innovation, solidifying its position as a trusted name in the industry.

news.headline: Family law attorney, Tiffany L. Andrews from Northern California, advises on prenuptial agreements for couples; debunks myths.
news.summary: In Folsom, California on February 13, 2025, Tiffany L. Andrews, a renowned family law attorney in Northern California, discussed prenuptial agreements. She provided guidance on the topic, dispelled common misconceptions, and assisted couples in determining the suitability of a prenup for their situation. Andrews shared her expertise through her platform "Talk to Tiffany."

news.headline: UAE starts mapping air corridors for air taxis, cargo drones to revolutionize urban transport.
news.summary: In Dubai, UAE, a groundbreaking project has commenced to map out air corridors specifically for air taxis and cargo drones. This initiative aims to revolutionize urban transportation by providing dedicated routes for these aerial vehicles. This move is part of a larger effort to modernize transportation infrastructure in the region. The mapped air corridors will serve as designated pathways for air taxis and cargo drones to navigate efficiently through the city. The project signifies a significant step towards the integration of advanced aerial transportation methods in urban areas.

news.headline: Raoul Pal predicts Bitcoin reaching $250,000 to $350,000 if ISM Index hits 60, as it signals economic expansion.
news.summary: Real Vision's CEO, Raoul Pal, presented a positive forecast for cryptocurrencies and the overall market, suggesting that the economic cycle is in its early stages. He believes Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) and alternative coins stand to gain substantially. The Institute of Supply Management (ISM) Index exceeded 50, indicating growth, as Pal explained on a podcast released on Feb. 12. According to him, Bitcoin tends to surge when the ISM surpasses 50, with historical trends implying a potential significant increase if the ISM hits 60. More details can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: NAMI HelpLine recognized by International Council for Helplines, showcasing dedication to excellence.
news.summary: In Arlington, Virginia, on February 13, 2025, the National Alliance on Mental Illness (NAMI) revealed that the NAMI HelpLine has been officially accredited by the International Council for Helplines (ICH). This accreditation underscores NAMI's commitment to delivering outstanding support and information services.

news.headline: Elon Musk threatens to withdraw $97.4B bid for OpenAI unless nonprofit mission is maintained.
news.summary: Mr. Musk stated in a legal document that he, along with other investors, would retract their offer of $97.4 billion if OpenAI decided against altering its organizational framework.

news.headline: Coinbase stock up 108.50% in a year, reporting $1.81 EPS and $1.83 billion revenues before Q4 earnings.
news.summary: Coinbase Global Inc (NASDAQ: COIN) is set to disclose its Q4 earnings on Thursday, with Wall Street predicting an EPS of $1.81 and revenues amounting to $1.83 billion for the period. The company is expected to post these results after the market closes. Over the past year, the stock has surged by 108.50% and has shown a 13.80% increase year-to-date. Analysts are closely observing the stock's performance against these forecasts. Recent reports suggest that COIN stock is exhibiting strong bullish trends in anticipation of the Q4 earnings release. This sentiment is in line with revised price expectations by top Wall Street forecasters for Coinbase.

news.headline: Discover how NVIDIA's NeMo Framework uses model pruning and knowledge distillation for efficient language models, cutting costs and energy while preserving performance. #NLP #AI
news.summary: The NeMo Framework developed by NVIDIA implements model pruning and knowledge distillation techniques to enhance the efficiency of language models. By utilizing these methods, the framework reduces computational expenses and energy usage while preserving performance levels. This innovation demonstrates a significant reduction in costs, making the process more sustainable and effective. Learn more about this advancement in language model technology.

news.headline: eClinicalWorks helps largest Maine practice increase daily online payments by 31% with healow.
news.summary: In Westborough, Massachusetts, eClinicalWorks®, the top ambulatory cloud EHR provider, revealed that InterMed, the leading independent physician-owned practice in Maine, experienced a notable 31% rise in daily online payments thanks to healow Payment Services. Additionally, InterMed recently transitioned to the advanced eClinicalWorks Cloud, noting a substantial enhancement in response time and computing capabilities. The practice expressed gratitude towards eClinicalWorks and the healow implementation team for facilitating these improvements.

news.headline: VinFast delivered 53,139 EVs globally in Q4 2024, a 143% increase quarter-over-quarter. 342% increase year-over-year. Plans to at least double global deliveries in 2025. Full year earnings call scheduled.
news.summary: In the fourth quarter of 2024, VinFast saw a substantial growth in electric vehicle (EV) deliveries, reaching 53,139 units worldwide. This marked a notable 143% surge compared to the previous quarter, and a significant 342% increase from the same period last year. The company surpassed its delivery targets for the entirety of 2024. Looking ahead to 2025, VinFast aims to double its global deliveries. The earnings call for the fourth quarter of 2024 and full-year results is set to take place as scheduled.

news.headline: Sun Country Airlines to join Barclays' 42nd Annual Industrial Select Conference.
news.summary: An outbreak of a new virus has been reported in a city with a population of over 1 million people. So far, there have been 50 confirmed cases and 5 deaths related to the virus. Authorities are advising the public to take precautions and seek medical attention if they experience symptoms such as fever, cough, and difficulty breathing. The source of the virus is currently under investigation, and efforts are being made to contain its spread.

news.headline: Actor Berto Colón joins the Cristian Rivera Foundation board, aiming to help families dealing with Diffuse Intrinsic Pontine Glioma (DIPG).
news.summary: On February 13, 2025, The Cristian Rivera Foundation revealed the addition of actor Berto Colón to its board of directors. Through this appointment, the foundation aims to leverage Berto's commitment to creating positive change and his dedication to supporting families impacted by Diffuse Intrinsic Pontine Glioma (DIPG). The move is part of CRF's ongoing efforts to increase awareness and provide assistance to those affected by DIPG.

news.headline: NACON partners with Evo, becomes official headset of Evo 2025 in global deal.
news.summary: NACON has recently disclosed a significant global collaboration with Evo, the foremost fighting game tournament. As part of this partnership, NACON will serve as Evo's Global Partner. In addition, RIG, a subsidiary of NACON, has been appointed as the Official Headset of Evo's 2025 event. This collaboration marks a crucial step for both NACON and Evo, solidifying their commitment to the gaming community and the competitive fighting game sector.

news.headline: GAMCO Natural Resources, Gold & Income Trust approves $0.04 per share monthly distributions for April, May, June 2025.
news.summary: In Rye, New York on February 13, 2025, the Board of Trustees of GAMCO Natural Resources, Gold & Income Trust (NYSE:GNT) announced their decision to continue monthly cash distributions. They declared that $0.04 per share will be distributed for April, May, and June of 2025. The Board mentioned the possibility of distributing amounts surpassing the Fund's earnings. The distributions in 2025 for common shareholders are anticipated to be mainly classified as a return of capital for tax considerations.

news.headline: Neuroscientist uses iPhone for stress relief with vibration technology. App aids in calming nerves.
news.summary: In Pittsburgh, a dating app user gearing up for their first in-person meeting after weeks of messaging feels a rush of nerves. The fear of potential awkwardness and lack of chemistry looms large. However, the individual can turn to their iPhone for more than just distraction. Through Apollo S, an innovative app, they can seek solace and serenity, aiding in finding calmness and perspective amidst pre-date jitters.

news.headline: US Customs seizes Bitcoin mining ASICs at ports nationwide, including Bitmain models, targeting rival manufacturers. Regulatory scrutiny intensifies.
news.summary: U.S. Customs and Border Protection has increased its crackdown on cryptocurrency mining equipment, confiscating Bitcoin mining ASICs at various ports in the country. Acting on requests from the FCC, the agency reported detaining shipments of Bitmain's Antminer S21 and T21 models, and now focusing on hardware from MicroBT and Canaan as well. This heightened enforcement signifies a notable rise in regulatory scrutiny on mining hardware imports. CBP is currently holding mining unit shipments at entry points due to compliance issues related to FCC regulations, as per documents and sources reviewed by Blockspace. The seizures were prompted by concerns that some units contained AI chips from Sophgo, a Chinese company.

news.headline: Nexon's Q4 earnings for 2024 were announced, promising sustained growth. Record-breaking revenue was achieved, focusing on strengthening existing franchises like Dungeon&Fighter. CEO Junghun Lee aims to increase creative force for growth and profitability.
news.summary: In Tokyo, Nexon Co., Ltd. revealed its financial performance for Q4 and fiscal year closing on December 31, 2024. With Nexon (3659.TO) being a key player in online gaming sector, the company witnessed remarkable revenue during 2024. Junghun Lee, the President and CEO of Nexon, expressed the organization's dedication to enhancing long-standing games such as Dungeon&Fighter to ensure consistent expansion and profitability. The company plans to strategically boost its internal creative resources and recently initiated a co-development deal for further growth.

news.headline: Olympic medalist Gabby Thomas partners with Amazfit as brand ambassador in Milpitas, California.
news.summary: Olympic medalist Gabby Thomas has recently signed on as an athlete ambassador for Amazfit, a company based in Milpitas, California. Thomas, a five-time Olympic medalist, will represent the brand in this new role.

news.headline: LA Clippers' Norman Powell signs with Skechers for basketball footwear; to compete in 3-point contest at NBA All-Star Weekend on Feb 15.
news.summary: Los Angeles Clippers shooting guard Norman Powell has recently signed an exclusive deal with Skechers Basketball to wear their performance footwear on the court. Powell, who will be participating in the 3-point contest at NBA All-Star Weekend on February 15th, expressed his satisfaction with Skechers, noting that many players have been seen wearing the brand. Powell emphasized that the Skechers Basketball shoes are a perfect match for him.

news.headline: New series 'Trial & Error: Why Did O.J. Win?' premieres Feb 16 at 8pm ET/PT on Court TV, explores O.J. Simpson trial.
news.summary: Beginning on Sunday, February 16, 2025, Court TV will release its new seven-part limited series titled "Trial & Error: Why Did O.J. Win?" at 8 p.m. ET/PT. This show will delve into the well-known double murder trial of O.J. Simpson, a case which Court TV extensively covered.

news.headline: York Pain Center partners with PatchRx for advanced chronic pain care using sensor technology and data science. (Total characters: 108)
news.summary: In YORK, Pa., the York Pain Center is leading the way in revolutionizing chronic pain management. By combining cutting-edge sensor technology with advanced data science and machine learning, they are enhancing patient adherence, pinpointing health risks, and improving clinical results. This innovative approach is set to transform the traditional model of care. The development was announced on Feb. 13, 2025.

news.headline: Australian Open winner Brian Teacher unveils updated coaching platform Full Court Tennis. Visit www.fullcourttennis.com.
news.summary: Newly launched website www.fullcourttennis.com offers virtual tennis coaching and has made it easier for players to improve their skills. Former Grand Slam champion Brian Teacher is behind the updated Full Court Tennis (FCT) website, which was launched in Pasadena, California on February 13, 2025. Players can now sign up on the improved platform for coaching services.

news.headline: Hydrolix earns Amazon CloudFront Ready status, offering observability for AWS customers, saving costs.
news.summary: Hydrolix, a company based in Portland, Oregon, has introduced a new service on February 13, 2025, aimed at providing observability from origin to edge for Amazon Web Services (AWS) users. This offering is designed to reduce expenses and expedite the identification of issues. Hydrolix's streaming data lake platform is being utilized for this purpose.

news.headline: Barrel King partners with Mash & Drum's Jason Callori to launch Drum Key Spirits, an industry-first collaboration in Bourbon, MO.
news.summary: In Bourbon, Missouri on February 13, 2025, Barrel King revealed a groundbreaking partnership with Jason Callori, a well-known whiskey connoisseur and the founder of Mash & Drum, to introduce Drum Key Spirits. This collaboration between Barrel King and Mash & Drum's Jason Callori marks an unprecedented venture in the industry.

news.headline: K2 Space secures $110M Series B funding for satellite production, successful in-space demo.
news.summary: In Torrance, California, on February 13, 2025, K2 Space revealed that it has secured $110 million in its Series B funding. This investment will be used to increase the mass production of its multi-orbit, high power satellite platform. The funding round was jointly led by Lightspeed Venture Partners and Altimeter Capital.

news.headline: Donner debuts sleek Donner OURA™ Series pianos, combining design and sound quality (Date: Feb. 13, 2025).
news.summary: Donner, a renowned musical instrument innovator, has introduced the latest Donner OURA™ Series of digital pianos, seamlessly combining Scandinavian minimalist design with top-notch sounds. The release was announced in Anaheim, California on February 13, 2025. This new series showcases a fusion of high-quality sounds and sleek aesthetics, solidifying Donner's position as a frontrunner in the industry.
